clue: Question about origin of eating breakfast cereal?
explanation: WHEAT: "breakfast cereal?". WHAT ("question") about E (origin of "eating").
hints: We need a question word. (What, where, when, why, who...)
We're going to put our question word around ("about") the other part of the wordplay.
Our answer will be a "breakfast cereal", but the question mark indicates that the answer will be a little cheeky.
